title: Tampere Praksis: First-Line Managers' Views on Managerial Work, Workplace Wellbeing and Change Management in Social Work 2018
description: This qualitative dataset consists of interviews with social workers in the public sector working as first-line managers at their organisation. Interview themes included management of social work, workplace well-being, and management for change. Individual questions examined, for instance, challenges and requirements posed by management as well as the best parts of management work and the opportunities it provides.
